ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., jacket, shirt) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XSmall, Large) */,
  "jacket_chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement of the jacket */,
  "suitable_chest_min" REAL /* Minimum suitable chest size for the person wearing the jacket */,
  "suitable_chest_max" REAL /* Maximum suitable chest size for the person wearing the jacket */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement of the jacket */,
  "sleeves" TEXT /* Sleeve length of the jacket */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of customer measurements */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "chest_size" REAL /* Customer's chest size in inches */,
  "shoulder_size" REAL /* Customer's shoulder size in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Customer's sleeve length in inches */,
  "height" REAL /* Customer's height in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Customer's weight in pounds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the clothing item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or additional feedback from the customer */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virtual_try_on" (
  "try_on_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virtual try-on */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the clothing item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the virtual try-on was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("try_on_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_try_on_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_try_on_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_try_on_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (0-1 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
